excerpt: A shy teen moonlights as a popular pirate radio DJ, alarming the local high school’s corrupt administration.
title: Pump Up the Volume

excerpt: Skirt-chasing dandy Cary Grant pursues a foreign beauty unaware she’s part of a plot to swindle him out of a mining concession, while telephone operator Frances Drake tries to warn him.
title: Ladies Should Listen

excerpt: A visiting anthropologist falls under the spell of a witch who transforms her into a bloodthirsty floating head with dangling entrails.
title: Mystics in Bali

excerpt: When the government blocks a research team’s work, one of its scientists seeks alternative avenues and finds himself entangled with shadowy figures.
title: The Risk

excerpt: A novelist helps an alien girl and her alien cat retrieve weapon parts needed to defeat an alien monster possessing humans.
title: The Cat
